task.title: Task
task.description: What should the agent do? e.g. 'Find all pages about Q1 planning' or 'Create a new page titled Meeting Notes with today's date'

searchKeyword.title: YouTube Search Keyword
searchKeyword.description: Keyword to research on YouTube (e.g. 'clerk creators'). If provided, runs the YouTube → Notion research workflow instead of the generic agent.

notionPageId.title: Notion Page ID
notionPageId.description: ID of the Notion page to append YouTube research results to (required when searchKeyword is set)

llmProvider.title: LLM Provider
llmProvider.description: Which LLM to use for the agent

llmModel.title: LLM Model
llmModel.description: Model name. Leave blank to use the default for the chosen provider.

llmApiKey.title: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.description: API key for Anthropic or OpenAI

notionIdentifier.title: Notion Account Identifier
notionIdentifier.description: Identifier used when connecting the Notion account in Scalekit

youtubeIdentifier.title: YouTube Account Identifier
youtubeIdentifier.description: Scalekit identifier for the YouTube connected account

topN.title: Top N Channels
topN.description: How many top channels to surface in the Notion page

maxIterations.title: Max Agent Iterations
maxIterations.description: Safety limit on the number of LLM + tool call rounds (generic agent mode only)
